#  Export the Labor Budget to Actual Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/permissions)
  * The report can be exported as a CSV or PDF.


##  Things to Consider 
  * [Import a Unit Quantity Based Budget](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/import-a-unit-quantity-based-budget)


##  Steps 
  * From the Project's 360 Reporting Tool
  * From the Project's Timesheets Tool


#### From the Project's 360 Reporting Tool
  1. Navigate to the project's **360 Reporting** tool.
  2. Click **Canned Project Reports**.
  3. Click **Labor Budget to Actual**.
  4. Click **Export** and select **PDF** or **CSV** to download the file to your computer.  
![Export Labor Budget To Actual Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/32f381eb2f91d56df682ea61019a29bc/71bd7fc72a501cd2751fcc2b0132d8f0/export-labor-budget-to-actual-report.png?fm=webp)


#### From the Project's Timesheets Tool
  1. Navigate to the project's **Timesheets** tool.
  2. Click **Reports.**
  3. Click **Labor Budget to Actual**.
  4. Click **Export** and select **PDF** or **CSV** to download the file to your computer.  
![Export Labor Budget To Actual Report](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/32f381eb2f91d56df682ea61019a29bc/71bd7fc72a501cd2751fcc2b0132d8f0/export-labor-budget-to-actual-report.png?fm=webp)


## See Also

  * [Import a Unit Quantity Based Budget](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/tutorials/import-a-unit-quantity-based-budget)
